qa_pair.question: How many tools does the github-sdlc-planning MCP server expose? Answer with just the number.
Call get_agent_capabilities. What is the value of the hooksSupported field? Answer True or False.
Call get_agent_capabilities. What is the value of the mifConformance field?
Call format_mif_issue_body with meta {id: "ship-it", type: "Task", namespace: "acme"} and body "Do the thing.". What is the second line of the returned body?
Call parse_mif_issue_body with raw "Just a plain body, no frontmatter.". Is the meta field null? Answer True or False.
What is the name of the tool that lists a parent issue's sub-issues?
According to add_sub_issue's own client-side limit, what is the maximum number of sub-issues allowed per parent before it rejects with limit_exceeded? Answer with just the number.
According to add_sub_issue's own client-side limit, what is the maximum nesting-level depth allowed before it rejects with limit_exceeded? Answer with just the number.
What is the name of the tool that assigns (or unassigns) a milestone on an issue?
Which GraphQL mutation does create_discussion call to create a Discussion?
